intent_tree: {"创建一个程序，用于获取微信文章并保存到电脑": {"验证用户输入的微信文章网址是否正确": {}, "从正确的网址中抓取文章内容": {}, "解析文章内容并提取标题和正文": {}, "将文章内容保存为本地文件": {"保留文章格式并处理图片资源": {"下载远程图片到本地存储": {}, "生成完整的HTML文档结构": {}, "优化保存文件的目录结构": {}}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "提示用户输入微信文章网址"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "使用正则表达式验证输入的网址格式"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "发起HTTP请求以获取目标网页的内容"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "使用BeautifulSoup解析HTML文档"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "从HTML中提取文章标题"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "从HTML中提取文章正文"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "清理文件名中的非法字符"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "创建保存文章的本地目录（如果不存在）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "将文章内容保存为UTF-8编码的txt文件"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "解析HTML中的图片标签并提取图片链接"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "补全相对路径的图片链接"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "下载图片到本地并替换为本地路径"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "生成包含样式的完整HTML文档"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "保存HTML文件及其相关资源到指定目录"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "validateInput"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "fetchContentIfValid"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "parseHTML"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "extractTitle"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node6", "type": "extractContent"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "cleanFilename"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "createDirectoryIfNeeded"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node10", "type": "processImages"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "resolveRelativePaths"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "downloadImagesLocally"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "generateStyledHTML"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveHTMLAndResources"}]}
mapping: {"创建一个程序，用于获取微信文章并保存到电脑": {"nodes": ["Node1", "Node2", "Node3", "Node4", "Node5", "Node6", "Node7", "Node8", "Node10", "Node11", "Node12", "Node13", "Node14"]}, "验证用户输入的微信文章网址是否正确": {"nodes": ["Node1", "Node2"]}, "从正确的网址中抓取文章内容": {"nodes": ["Node3"]}, "解析文章内容并提取标题和正文": {"nodes": ["Node4", "Node5", "Node6"]}, "将文章内容保存为本地文件": {"nodes": ["Node7", "Node8", "Node10", "Node11", "Node12", "Node13", "Node14"]}, "保留文章格式并处理图片资源": {"nodes": ["Node10", "Node11", "Node12", "Node13", "Node14"]}, "下载远程图片到本地存储": {"nodes": ["Node12"]}, "生成完整的HTML文档结构": {"nodes": ["Node13"]}, "优化保存文件的目录结构": {"nodes": ["Node8", "Node14"]}}
